title: Ice and Fire Delight ( Farmer's Delight & Ice and Fire Add-on)
description: a simple addition to "Farmer's Pleasure" and "ice and fire", adding some food
body:
a simple addition to "Farmer's Delight" and "ice and fire", adding some food

 

The addition adds a variety of dishes made from mythical creatures of the "ice and fire" mod

 

hydra and dragon nuggets

 

fried eggs and jelly from myrmex

 

sandwiches have a positive effect, and various cocktails allow you to use the forces hidden in them

if it's not difficult for you, you can leave a review on the discord channel with the appropriate name
